name: Sojiro Sakura
description: Sojiro Sakura is the manager of Cafe Leblanc in Yongen-Jaya. He oversees the care of the protagonist during his probation in Tokyo. ~! He is Futaba Sakura's adoptive father. !~

name: Takashi Takeda
description: A friend of Koiwai and Yotsuba, having known Koiwai since they were childhood classmates. Standing 2m10 (6 ft 11 in) tall, he dwarfs the other characters, especially Yotsuba. He is always called by the nickname "Jumbo," and when Fuka learns his real name she calls it "common." He works at his father's flower shop, as Yotsuba discovers when she meets him there. He helps the Koiwais move in and frequently visits their house, where he is more or less treated as a member of the family by Yotsuba. __

name: Yu-Mi Lee
description: Leader of Team Tarantula.

name: Yuugo Tennouji
description: Owner of the CRT TV Workshop set up in the first floor of the Oohiyama building. Also the landlord. Widower. Has an only daughter by the name of Nae, though he's the only one who loves CRTs. Hates LCDs with a passion, and perhaps anarchic. Though he's not quite enthusiastic in the CRT TV Workshop, for some reason he doesn't seem like he'd go bankrupt anytime soon. name: Alice
description: Alice is a young, carefree girl who is the 431st guest of the manor. She expresses that she despises lies and carries herself in a nonchalant way through a journey said to be "tantamount to suicide" ~!At the end of the manga, Alice is revealed to be more of an anti-hero. She was a princess bedridden from illness that held nothing but the desire to truly experience the world. name: Amanda
description: Amanda is a half-elf who is an extremely famous and powerful A-ranked Adventurer of Altessa, who's main weapon of a choice is a mixture of a whip and wind magic.

name: Biwa
description: The daughter of a biwa hōshi who is killed by agents of the Taira after Biwa unintentionally insults them. She dresses like a boy and has one green and one brown eye which enables her to see into the future. Her character does not appear in the original epic story.

name: Cesar de Lehman Klein
description: The first prince, and a maid's son.

nativeName: シェリア・ブレンディ

Chelia is the typical "Dojikko", a very clumsy and cute girl that falls over a lot. She also seems determined to please the Guild Master of Lamia Scale. name: Chihiro Ayasato
description: Mia Fey is the head of her own criminal defense law firm and serves as Phoenix's boss and mentor. Always cool under pressure, Mia Fey is smart, tenacious, a strict teacher, and sometimes even coy. She has a great affection for her sister but is also very independent, and strives to uncover truth at all costs. Misc Facts: She seems to have a problem with names, calling "Naruhodou" "Naruhodo" (there is a difference!) in the Japanese game, and Larry "Harry" (in the Japanese, Yahari becomes Yappari)

name: Diana
description: Diana is a dancer who died whilst giving birth to Athanasia. She is mainly depicted as "fairy-like" and graceful, and has no recorded contact with Athanasia in the manhwa other than brief dreams where Athy sees her mother interacting with Claude (and vice-versa). In a sense, Diana saves Athy from death during the Ruby Palace massacre and secures her place as Obelia's next heir by giving her child the name "Athanasia", which Claude found humorous. mediaTitles: The Fated Magical Princess: Who Made Me a Princess

name: E.M. Pino
description: Pino is a miniature anti-bot machine who joins the crew of Edens Zero. She can emit bursts of electromagnetic pulses, also known as EMP, that short out electronics for a few seconds and cancel out Ether Gear when it's in use. Her digital avatar resembles a young human girl with rabbit-like ears. She wears a necktie that is decorated with a single large heart.

name: Floyd Leech
description: A second-year student in Octavinelle and near-identical twin of Jade. Floyd, despite being Jade's twin, has a drastically different personality from his brother. The way he speaks is totally different, generally much more teasing/bullying towards others, and even violent in some cases. It's hard to tell what he may be thinking as well, as his mood can change quickly for small reasons. Sometimes Floyd can get depressed and not feel like teasing anyone, which can sometimes be more frightening to o

name: Hiraku Machio
description: **Race:** Human Hiraku Machio is the main protagonist of Isekai Nonbiri Nouka series. He was resurrected with a healthy body, the ability to speak the common tongue, and the All-Purpose Farming Tool (AFT) by God. Despite being unable to use magic, he cultivates the forest to create farmland and a village, with the help of the wolves Kuro and Yuki, the demon spider Zabuton , and even humanoid species.

name: Hoshi
description: __Height__: 179 cm A 24 year old man with a star-shaped head. Therefore he is simply named 'Hoshi' by the village chief. Hoshi is an artist who often performs with his guitar near the riverbank. He is also a heavy chain smoker and considers Riku as his rival (mostly for Nino's love). ~!He seems to wear a star mask in order to hide his face and shame, because of his failed music career. He only ever wanted to sing his own songs written by him, but they were always turned down. He went to the rive

name: Impmon
description: A tricky Digimon who lives in the human world and seems to have it in for the Tamers. Once belonging to two young kids, he left them to live on his own and gain power. Despite his small size, he is fairly powerful (though he runs more than he fights) and can blast enemies with fire-based attacks. Not truely evil, yet not quite a hero either. He manages to evolve into Beelzebumon (with motorcycle and dual guns) in the Digital World, but still loses to the Tamers. Once he reunites with his owners

name: Iruka Okazaki
description: __Height:__ 161cm Iruka Okazaki is a figure skating athlete who accompanied Riina Kojo who helped host the opening ceremony of the Chuubu Block Tournament. She is also an A Class Star Skater who goes to Kankyou University High School. ~!Iruka acts coldly towards Inori, but secretly has quite a soft spot for her.!~

name: Itsuki Myoudouin
description: She is a second-year student at Myoudou Academy and is also the student council president. Itsuki's alter ego is Cure Sunshine. Befitting of her image and upbringing, Itsuki is a wise and princely young woman who is very formal with others. She is calm-tempered and kind, willing to help friends and strangers alike, but she can also be stern when it's necessary and has no problem stepping in to defend those weaker than her. She is brave and compassionate, but this will not stop her from unleashin

name: Jean-Jacques Chastel
description: __Race:__ Vampire __Partner:__ Chloe d'Apchier Jean-Jacques Chastel is a vampire who is shown to be a servant of Chloe d'Apchier in D'Apchier Family Castle at Silver Forest, Gévaudan. ~! Later, Jean Jacques is revealed to be the true Beast of Gevaudan, having made a contract with Naenia to undergo a monstrous transformation. !~

name: Karin Sarayashiki
description: Karin Sarayashiki is a beautiful and popular horror-game streamer hailed as the #1 Female Game Streamer People Want to be Stepped on by online, known as "the Cursed Princess". Despite coming across as initially aggressive and confrontational, she is actually easily scared despite being an avid player of horror games and can be sensitive and caring to her friends. She becomes Yuzu's best female friend.
